set: Modifies a variable using a math operation (`set_to`, `add`, `subtract`, `multiply_by`, `divide_by`, `modulo`, or `=`). The target can be a custom variable, member variable, or built-in global.
set_score: Modifies a player or team score using a math operation and a numeric value or variable reference.
random: Writes a random integer into an out-variable between the configured minimum and maximum. The minimum is inclusive; the maximum is exclusive.
create_object: Spawns an object of the given type at a reference object, with optional filter, flags, and offset.
delete_object: Removes an object reference from the map.
object_destroy: Destroys an object immediately (distinct from `delete_object` in engine handling).
object_set_invincibility: Sets whether an object can take damage.
object_attach: Attaches one object to another with offset and constraint parameters.
object_detach: Detaches a child object from its parent.
object_bounce: Applies an upward impulse to an object.
object_set_scale: Scales an object by a multiplier.
object_set_never_garbage: Prevents the engine from garbage-collecting an object.
object_face_object: Rotates an object to face another object.
object_get_distance: Writes the distance between two objects into an out-variable.
object_get_health: Reads an object's current health into an out-variable.
object_get_shield: Reads an object's current shields into an out-variable.
object_get_velocity: Reads an object's velocity into an out-variable.
object_get_orientation: Reads an object's orientation into an out-variable.
object_adjust_health: Modifies an object's current health with a math operation.
object_adjust_shield: Modifies an object's current shields with a math operation.
object_adjust_maximum_health: Modifies an object's maximum health with a math operation.
object_adjust_maximum_shield: Modifies an object's maximum shields with a math operation.
get_random_object: Selects a random object matching criteria and writes it to an out-variable.
hide_object: Hides or shows an object for players (Reach MCC only).
navpoint_set_visible: Controls navpoint visibility for a target audience (everyone, team, player, etc.).
navpoint_set_icon: Sets the navpoint icon displayed above an object.
navpoint_set_timer: Links a navpoint to a timer for countdown display.
navpoint_set_visible_range: Sets the distance at which a navpoint becomes visible.
navpoint_set_text: Sets navpoint label text from a string table entry or literal.
timer_set_rate: Sets a timer's tick rate. `0` pauses, `-1` counts down, `1` is normal speed.
timer_reset: Resets a timer to its initial value.
hud_post_message: Posts a HUD message to a player, team, or everyone. The sound operand selects an [e_megalo_sound](/language/enums/sounds) token or `none`.
hud_widget_set_text: Updates text on a named HUD widget.
hud_widget_set_value: Updates a numeric value displayed on a HUD widget.
hud_widget_set_meter: Configures meter parameters on a HUD widget.
hud_widget_set_icon: Sets the icon on a HUD widget.
hud_widget_set_visibility: Shows or hides a HUD widget for a player reference.
play_sound: Plays a sound for a player, team, or everyone. Sound tokens are listed in [Sounds](/language/enums/sounds).
submit_incident: Fires a game incident with player/team context (from `incidents.txt`).
submit_incident_with_custom_value: Fires a game incident and passes a custom numeric value.
apply_player_traits: Applies a named `player_traits` block to a player.
set_loadout_palette: Assigns a loadout palette tier to a player or team.
set_pickup_filter: Restricts who can pick up an object (`all`, `allies`, `enemies`, `no_one`).
set_respawn_filter: Restricts who can respawn at an object.
set_fireteam_respawn_filter: Restricts fireteam respawn permissions on an object.
set_progress_bar: Configures an object's progress bar display.
set_boundary: Configures boundary shape parameters on an object.
boundary_set_visible: Shows or hides a boundary volume.
boundary_set_player_color: Sets boundary tint color for a player.
device_set_position_immediate: Snaps a device to a position without animation.
device_get_power: Reads device power into an out-variable.
device_get_position: Reads device position into an out-variable.
device_set_position_track: Assigns an animation track name to a device.
device_animate_position: Animates a device between positions over time.
player_set_objective: Sets objective text shown to a player.
player_set_primary_respawn_object: Sets a player's primary respawn object.
team_set_primary_respawn_object: Sets a team's primary respawn object.
team_set_coop_spawning: Enables or disables cooperative spawning for a team.
player_set_coop_spawning: Enables or disables cooperative spawning for a player.
player_set_requisition_palette: Assigns a requisition palette to a player.
player_enable_purchases: Enables or disables requisition purchases by category and alive/dead state.
player_adjust_money: Modifies a player's requisition money with a math operation.
player_get_vehicle: Writes the vehicle a player occupies into an out-variable.
player_set_vehicle: Forces a player into a vehicle reference.
player_get_weapon: Reads a player's current weapon into an out-variable.
player_get_equipment: Reads a player's equipment into an out-variable.
player_pick_up_weapon: Forces a player to pick up a weapon object.
player_get_place: Writes a player's scoreboard rank into an out-variable.
team_get_place: Writes a team's scoreboard rank into an out-variable.
player_get_killing_spree_count: Reads a player's killstreak count into an out-variable.
player_get_fireteam_index: Reads or writes a player's fireteam index.
player_set_fireteam_index: Assigns a player to a fireteam index.
player_death_get_killing_player: Writes the killing player from a death event into an out-variable.
player_death_get_damage_type: Writes the damage type from a death event into an out-variable.
player_death_get_special_type: Writes the special death type (melee, headshot, etc.) into an out-variable.
get_player_holding_object: Writes the player holding an object into an out-variable.
player_get_target_object: Reads a player's current target object into an out-variable.
biped_give_weapon: Gives a weapon to a biped/player.
biped_drop_weapon: Drops a weapon from a biped/player.
weapon_set_pickup_priority: Sets weapon pickup priority for an object.
adjust_grenades: Modifies a player's grenade count by type.
respawn_zone_enable: Enables or disables a respawn zone object.
set_scenario_interpolator_state: Sets a scenario interpolator state index.
for_each: Iterates over players, teams, or objects and runs nested trigger logic.
print_variable: Prints a variable value to the debug log.
break_into_debugger: Breaks into the script debugger when tracing is enabled.
debugging_enable_tracing: Enables or disables script tracing in the debugger.
debug_force_player_view_count: Debug action to force player view count.
saved_film_insert_marker: Inserts a marker into a saved film recording.
create_tunnel: Places an object between two entities and gives it a cylinder shape. Radius comes from the radius operand, or 5 if that value is 0.
game_grief_record_custom_penalty: Records a custom grief report penalty value.
begin: Marks the start of a nested sub-trigger block (Reach MCC only).
hs_function_call: Calls a HaloScript function by index (Reach MCC only).
get_button_time: Reads how long a scriptable button was held into an out-variable (Reach MCC only).
team_set_vehicle_spawning: Enables or disables vehicle spawning for a team (Reach MCC only).
player_set_vehicle_spawning: Enables or disables vehicle spawning for a player (Reach MCC only).
set_player_respawn_vehicle: Sets the respawn vehicle type for a player (Reach MCC only).
set_team_respawn_vehicle: Sets the respawn vehicle type for a team (Reach MCC only).
